channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: There Is No Shame in Getting Older
item.description: Rejecting old age means rejecting what makes a society vibrant.

item.title: Iran Closes Strait of Hormuz, Blames Israel for Ceasefire Violation
item.description: Iran shut the Strait of Hormuz three days after reopening, accusing Israel of strikes in Lebanon during a fragile ceasefire.

item.title: Russia Releases 24 Filipinos After Marcos-Putin Talks
item.description: Russia freed 24 Filipinos detained for months without charges in Siberia, following a conversation between President Marcos and Putin.

item.title: Boulder's Climate Lawsuit Is a Tax on Every American
item.description: The Supreme Court should block Colorado's attempt to override federal energy policy.
